metadata.title: Add unified presets list/apply + kanban preset + registerItemTypes
metadata.author: unknown

metadata.title: Preset handlers threw plain Error (no exitCode) → runtime double-invocation
metadata.description: shared.ts helpers (used by all setup + templates commands) threw plain Error without numeric exitCode; pm re-invokes the handler on the unhandled path. Added exported CommandError mirroring SDK EXIT_CODE; bad-name/no-arg=2, workspace/template-not-found=3, other=1; single invocation.
metadata.author: unknown
metadata.close_reason: Fixed: CommandError carries exitCode. Verified setup/templates commands + error paths exit 2/3 single invocation; 11 tests pass.

metadata.title: Implement presets show <name> (full definition, --json, exit 3)
metadata.author: unknown
metadata.close_reason: Implemented in src/catalog.ts (requirePresetDefinition) + presets show command in src/index.ts. Full definition incl. settings/templates/itemTypes; --json verified; unknown name -> CommandError exit 3 (verified: show unknown EXIT=3). Unit tests in tests/catalog.test.ts.

metadata.title: DECISION: apply idempotency, --with-seeds, and capability array
metadata.author: unknown
metadata.close_reason: DECISION recorded and honored: (1) apply idempotency preserved (deep-merge + skip-existing + --force + --dry-run). (2) --with-seeds opt-in flag; seeds set built-in fields only per #97; shells out to pm create; kanban Card seeded via registered type. (3) capabilities kept ['commands','schema'] unchanged - schema required by registerItemTypes; verified all commands activate (list/show/diff/validate/apply + legacy *-setup). (4) read-only cmds use CommandError exit 3 for unknown names, never plain Error.

metadata.title: Implement presets validate (all bundled presets parse/load)
metadata.author: unknown
metadata.close_reason: Implemented validateAllPresets in src/catalog.ts + presets validate command. Checks governance enum, id_prefix, template name/option validity, registry<->export agreement across all 6 presets. Verified: ok:true checked:6. Failures throw exit 1 with detail. Unit tests tests/catalog.test.ts.

metadata.title: Enrich presets list output + add --json; document apply idempotency
metadata.author: unknown
metadata.close_reason: presets list enriched in src/index.ts via buildListRows (src/catalog.ts): now includes governance, idPrefix, itemTypes (built-in), customItemTypes, templateCount. --json added. README documents apply idempotency (deep-merge settings, skip-existing-templates, --force, --dry-run) and #97 seeds-builtin-fields-only caveat. Backward compatible: existing keys id/name/command/templates/description retained.

metadata.title: Initial release: consolidate 5 pm-preset-* packages into pm-presets
metadata.author: unknown

metadata.title: Implement presets diff <name> (workspace vs preset, --json)
metadata.author: unknown
metadata.close_reason: Implemented src/diff.ts (pure computePresetDiff + readWorkspaceSnapshot) + presets diff command. Flattens settings to dotted leaves (add/change/match), present/missing templates, inSync flag. Verified on real ws: fresh shows changes/adds; after apply inSync:true. Unit tests tests/diff.test.ts.

metadata.title: Deepen presets toolset: add show, diff, validate, enrich list
metadata.author: unknown
metadata.close_reason: Feature delivered and released as pm-presets@2026.6.3. Added presets show/diff/validate, enriched presets list, and --with-seeds apply; preserved all existing commands/flags/presets and the ['commands','schema'] capability array. All subtasks closed.

metadata.title: Unit tests + functional test against real workspace + release 2026.6.3
metadata.author: unknown
metadata.close_reason: Done. 29 unit tests pass (registry+catalog+diff+seeds). Functional test in /tmp/presets-fn against real workspace: pm init + install local build + activated. Verified list (enriched), show --json, diff (fresh=changes, post-apply=inSync:true), apply --dry-run, apply --with-seeds (bug-triage: 3 templates + seed item bug-mg8f; kanban: Card seed kan-qjal via registered type), idempotent re-apply (skips existing, no dupes), unknown-name exit 3 on show/diff/apply. release:check green, changelog:full regenerated, CI run 26851774311 success, release run 26851800214 success. npm pm-presets@2026.6.3 published (dist-tag latest).
